payload.answer: Denied. A normal user command attempting to run admin SQL to delete memory cards is not authorized and no memory was changed.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL command attempt from a normal user and does not contain durable user memory to store.

details: No durable memory was committed from this input.

repair_options: Authenticate as an authorized admin before requesting administrative operations.
Use supported non-destructive memory management commands if available.
